locator: M. K. Gandhi, Hind Swaraj, Chapter 17 ('Passive Resistance'), 1909; author's English translation (1910); text verified at https://www.gandhiashramsevagram.org/hind-swaraj/chapter-17-passive-resistance.php
text: If by using violence I force the Government to repeal the law, I am employing what may be termed body-force. If I do not obey the law and accept the penalty for its breach, I use soul-force.

locator: M. K. Gandhi, Hind Swaraj, Chapter 17 ('Passive Resistance'), 1909; author's English translation (1910); text verified at https://www.gandhiashramsevagram.org/hind-swaraj/chapter-17-passive-resistance.php
text: Passive resistance, that is, soul-force, is matchless. It is superior to the force of arms.
